title: CreateClassic
body:
**CreateClassic** - is a Create modpack that contains only the essentials for a comfortable game with Create.

# 

<details>
<summary>Optimization mods</summary>

  > [Sodium](https://modrinth.com/mod/sodium) - Central optimization mod
> 
> [Sodium Extra](https://modrinth.com/mod/sodium-extra) - Sodium add-on that adds more useful settings to Sodium
>
> [Indium](https://modrinth.com/mod/indium) - Another Sodium add-on 
>
> [FerriteCore](https://modrinth.com/mod/ferrite-core) - Memory usage optimizations
>
> [Lithium](https://modrinth.com/mod/lithium) - Optimizes client or server logic
>
> [EntityCulling](https://modrinth.com/mod/entityculling) - Rendering of entities only, in the field of view
>
> [ImmediatelyFast](https://modrinth.com/mod/immediatelyfast) - Speed up immediate mode rendering in Minecraft
>
> [Reese's Sodium Options](https://modrinth.com/mod/reeses-sodium-options) - Alternative Options Menu for Sodium
>
> [Memory Leak Fix](https://modrinth.com/mod/memoryleakfix) - A mod that fixes random memory leaks for both the client and server
>
> [Dynamic FPS](https://modrinth.com/mod/dynamic-fps) - Reduce resource usage while Minecraft is in the background or idle.
>
> [More Culling](https://modrinth.com/mod/moreculling) - A mod that changes how multiple types of culling are handled in order to improve performance
>
> [LazyDFU](https://modrinth.com/mod/lazydfu) - Makes the game boot faster by deferring non-essential initialization
>
> [Debugify](https://modrinth.com/mod/debugify) - Fixes Minecraft bugs found on the bug tracker

</details>


<details>
<summary>Create</summary>

  > [Create](https://modrinth.com/mod/createfabric)
> 


</details>

<details>
<summary>Farmer's delight</summary>

  > [Farmer's Delight Refabricated](https://modrinth.com/mod/farmers-delight-refabricated)
>
> [Expanded Delight](https://modrinth.com/mod/expanded-delight)



</details>

(I was lazy to add libaries and some visual mods)
